zh-CN.name: 字母R
zh-CN.intro: R 是英文字母表里第十八个字母。它有个小尾巴，像小兔子蹦蹦跳。宝宝，跟我一起读：R！

story.title: 🐰R 像小兔子
story.body: 字母 R，真有趣，长长的腿，圆圆的头，还有一个小尾巴。花园里，小兔子蹦蹦跳，它的身体就像 R。小兔子说：“我是 Rabbit，我的名字开头就是 R！”宝宝伸出小手，画一个大 R：一竖下来，再上去画个半圆，最后斜斜来一笔。看，R 站起来啦！和妈妈一起找找，哪里还藏着 R？

knowledge.title: R 的来历
knowledge.body: 很久以前，R 的样子像一个人头。古埃及人把它画成头的形状，后来慢慢变成了现在的样子。R 在单词里常常发出“rrr”的声音，像小汽车发动。

en.name: R
en.intro: R is the eighteenth letter of the alphabet. It has a little tail, like a hopping bunny. Let's say R together!

story.title: 🐰R is for Rabbit
story.body: Letter R is so funny! It has a long leg, a round head, and a little tail. In the garden, a bunny hops around, and its body looks just like R. The bunny says, “I am Rabbit, and my name starts with R!” Stretch out your little hand and draw a big R: a line down, then up and around for a half circle, and a slanted line at the end. Look, R stands up! Let's find more R's together!

knowledge.title: Where does R come from?
knowledge.body: Long ago, R looked like a person's head. Ancient Egyptians drew it as a head shape, and slowly it became the R we know today. In words, R often makes a “rrr” sound, like a car engine starting.
